    Serialized Form

    • Package pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.controller

      • Class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.controller.ControllerServlet

        class ControllerServlet extends jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServlet implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • model
            Model model
            model - an instance of Model class, conducts the Rail Fence cipher.
          • readFromCookies
            boolean readFromCookies
            readFromCookies - a Boolean value regarding the initialization of ControllerServlet.stats being read from cookies.
          • result
            String result
            result - the end result of the conducted cipher.
          • stats
            HashMap<String,Integer> stats
            stats - is HashMap being used to count the events happening in the ControllerServlet.

      • Class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.controller.HistoryServlet

        class HistoryServlet extends jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServlet implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • history
            List<LogEntry> history
            history - a list of LogEntry class records containing the history of all cipher operations.
          • model
            Model model
            model - an instance of Model class, allows for the access of actionHistory list.

    • Package pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model

      • Class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.CipherParams

        class CipherParams extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • cId
            Long cId
            cId is the CipherParams record id.
          • modeSelect
            String modeSelect
            modeSelect - either en - encoding or de - decoding.
          • noOfRails
            int noOfRails
            the number of rails needed for the cipher.
          • resultHistory
            ResultHistory resultHistory
            resultHistory is a mapping to the appropriate ResultHistory record (one-to-one).
          • textCipher
            String textCipher
            textCipher - the text to either encode or decode.

      • Exception Class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.IncorrectNoOfRailsException

        class IncorrectNoOfRailsException extends Exception implements Serializable

      • Class pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence6.model.ResultHistory

        class ResultHistory extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • cipherParams
            CipherParams cipherParams
            cipherParams is a mapping to the appropriate cipherParams record (one-to-one).
          • result
            String result
            result is the result of the cipher operation, either Encryption or Decryption.
          • rId
            Long rId
            rId is the ResultHistory record id.
